codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: heartbeat_runs and issues received the required nullable FK and reconciliation/pickup columns, issue_dependencies was added with the requested composite PK and foreign keys, migration 0048 was generated, schema exports were updated, and schema tests were expanded to cover the new columns/table.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill's testing guidance is misaligned for DB-schema-only features. It instructs creating tests under server/src/__tests__, but this feature correctly used packages/db schema tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md says "Create test file in server/src/__tests__/" under "Write tests first"; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 99c8542e-6f4c-4aaa-b0d5-cf579e00dba2 shows reads/edits to packages/db/src/schema-new-tables.test.ts instead.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Full-suite test flakiness appears in this mission context and is not captured in shared library notes, causing repeated reruns during validation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoffs/2026-04-01T05-07-51-780Z__fork-existing-table-columns__99c8542e-6f4c-4aaa-b0d5-cf579e00dba2.json lists intermittent failures in board-mutation-guard.test.ts and agent-skills-routes.test.ts; transcript skeleton shows repeated pnpm test:run executions and temporary git stash/pop around retries.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, and transcript skeleton for fork-existing-table-columns. The feature is correctly implemented and acceptable to merge; no blocking or non-blocking code defects were found in the scoped changes.
